text.title: testing-javascript Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for testing-javascript as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Jest fails on ESM-only package (e.g., chalk v5, node-fetch v3)
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Jest uses CommonJS by default. ESM-only packages must be transformed. Vitest avoids this entirely.
